verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Laudate nomen Domini ;  laudate, servi, Dominum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ הַֽ֭לְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה הַֽ֝לְל֗וּ עַבְדֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. Praise ye the name of the Lord; praise him, O ye servants of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui statis in domo Domini,  in atriis domus Dei nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁ֣֭עֹמְדִים בְּבֵ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה בְּ֝חַצְר֗וֹת בֵּ֣ית אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: Ye that stand in the house of the Lord, in the courts of the house of our God,

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate Dominum, quia bonus Dominus ;  psallite nomini ejus, quoniam suave.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽלְלוּ־יָ֭הּ כִּֽי־ט֣וֹב יְהֹוָ֑ה זַמְּר֥וּ לִ֝שְׁמ֗וֹ כִּ֣י נָעִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Praise the Lord; for the Lord is good: sing praises unto his name; for it is pleasant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam Jacob elegit sibi Dominus ;  Israël in possessionem sibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יַעֲקֹ֗ב בָּחַ֣ר ל֣וֹ יָ֑הּ יִ֝שְׂרָאֵ֗ל לִסְגֻלָּתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord hath chosen Jacob unto himself, and Israel for his peculiar treasure.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia ego cognovi quod magnus est Dominus,  et Deus noster præ omnibus diis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י אֲנִ֣י יָ֭דַעְתִּי כִּֽי־גָד֣וֹל יְהֹוָ֑ה וַ֝אֲדֹנֵ֗ינוּ מִכׇּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: For I know that the Lord is great, and that our Lord is above all gods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia quæcumque voluit Dominus fecit,  in cælo, in terra, in mari et in omnibus abyssis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֤ל אֲשֶׁר־חָפֵ֥ץ יְהֹוָ֗ה עָ֫שָׂ֥ה בַּשָּׁמַ֥יִם וּבָאָ֑רֶץ בַּ֝יַּמִּ֗ים וְכׇל־תְּהֹמֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Whatsoever the Lord pleased, that did he in heaven, and in earth, in the seas, and all deep places.

verses.latin_vulgate: Educens nubes ab extremo terræ,  fulgura in pluviam fecit ;  qui producit ventos de thesauris suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַעֲלֶ֣ה נְשִׂאִים֮ מִקְצֵ֢ה הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ בְּרָקִ֣ים לַמָּטָ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה מֽוֹצֵא־ר֝֗וּחַ מֵאֽוֹצְרוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: He causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth; he maketh lightnings for the rain; he bringeth the wind out of his treasuries.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui percussit primogenita Ægypti,  ab homine usque ad pecus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁ֭הִכָּה בְּכוֹרֵ֣י מִצְרָ֑יִם מֵ֝אָדָ֗ם עַד־בְּהֵמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Who smote the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and beast.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et misit signa et prodigia in medio tui, Ægypte :  in Pharaonem, et in omnes servos ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁלַ֤ח ׀ אוֹתֹ֣ת וּ֭מֹפְתִים בְּתוֹכֵ֣כִי מִצְרָ֑יִם בְּ֝פַרְעֹ֗ה וּבְכׇל־עֲבָדָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Who sent tokens and wonders into the midst of thee, O Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his servants.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui percussit gentes multas,  et occidit reges fortes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁ֭הִכָּה גּוֹיִ֣ם רַבִּ֑ים וְ֝הָרַ֗ג מְלָכִ֥ים עֲצוּמִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Who smote great nations, and slew mighty kings;

verses.latin_vulgate: Sehon, regem Amorrhæorum, et Og, regem Basan,  et omnia regna Chanaan :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְסִיח֤וֹן ׀ מֶ֤לֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִ֗י וּ֭לְעוֹג מֶ֣לֶךְ הַבָּשָׁ֑ן וּ֝לְכֹ֗ל מַמְלְכ֥וֹת כְּנָֽעַן׃
verses.king_james: Sihon king of the Amorites, and Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan:

verses.latin_vulgate: et dedit terram eorum hæreditatem,  hæreditatem Israël populo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַ֣ן אַרְצָ֣ם נַחֲלָ֑ה נַ֝חֲלָ֗ה לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל עַמּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And gave their land for an heritage, an heritage unto Israel his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, nomen tuum in æternum ;  Domine, memoriale tuum in generationem et generationem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְ֭הֹוָה שִׁמְךָ֣ לְעוֹלָ֑ם יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה זִכְרְךָ֥ לְדֹר־וָדֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: Thy name, O Lord, endureth for ever; and thy memorial, O Lord, throughout all generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia judicabit Dominus populum suum,  et in servis suis deprecabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יָדִ֣ין יְהֹוָ֣ה עַמּ֑וֹ וְעַל־עֲ֝בָדָ֗יו יִתְנֶחָֽם׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord will judge his people, and he will repent himself concerning his servants.

verses.latin_vulgate: Simulacra gentium argentum et aurum,  opera manuum hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲצַבֵּ֣י הַ֭גּוֹיִם כֶּ֣סֶף וְזָהָ֑ב מַ֝עֲשֵׂ֗ה יְדֵ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The idols of the heathen are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os habent, et non loquentur ;  oculos habent, et non videbunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פֶּֽה־לָ֭הֶם וְלֹ֣א יְדַבֵּ֑רוּ עֵינַ֥יִם לָ֝הֶ֗ם וְלֹ֣א יִרְאֽוּ׃
verses.king_james: They have mouths, but they speak not; eyes have they, but they see not;

verses.latin_vulgate: Aures habent, et non audient ;  neque enim est spiritus in ore ipsorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אׇזְנַ֣יִם לָ֭הֶם וְלֹ֣א יַאֲזִ֑ינוּ אַ֝֗ף אֵין־יֶשׁ־ר֥וּחַ בְּפִיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: They have ears, but they hear not; neither is there any breath in their mouths.

verses.latin_vulgate: Similes illis fiant qui faciunt ea,  et omnes qui confidunt in eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּ֭מוֹהֶם יִהְי֣וּ עֹשֵׂיהֶ֑ם כֹּ֖ל אֲשֶׁר־בֹּטֵ֣חַ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: They that make them are like unto them: so is every one that trusteth in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domus Israël, benedicite Domino ;  domus Aaron, benedicite Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֣ית יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל בָּרְכ֣וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה בֵּ֥ית אַ֝הֲרֹ֗ן בָּרְכ֥וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Bless the Lord, O house of Israel: bless the Lord, O house of Aaron:

verses.latin_vulgate: Domus Levi, benedicite Domino ;  qui timetis Dominum, benedicite Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֣ית הַ֭לֵּוִי בָּרְכ֣וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה יִֽרְאֵ֥י יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה בָּרְכ֥וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Bless the Lord, O house of Levi: ye that fear the Lord, bless the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus ex Sion,  qui habitat in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֘ר֤וּךְ יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ מִצִּיּ֗וֹן שֹׁ֘כֵ֤ן יְֽרוּשָׁלָ֗͏ִם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord out of Zion, which dwelleth at Jerusalem. Praise ye the Lord.
